name: AI Ticket Routing
description: Classify incoming support tickets, route high-confidence tickets, require review for medium confidence, and send low-confidence tickets to triage.

name: ACH Payment Onboarding
description: Collect bank-account details, verify ownership, create a payment method, and handle duplicate and failed verification attempts.

name: Refund Approval
description: Allow agents to request refunds, require supervisor approval above a threshold, and record the final decision.

name: KYC Exception Review
description: Route failed identity checks to an operations analyst and preserve evidence and decision history.

name: Password Reset
description: Issue a time-limited reset link, invalidate previous links, and lock repeated suspicious attempts.

name: Subscription Cancellation
description: Let customers cancel, show effective date and final charge, and route disputed charges to support.

name: Warehouse Downtime Alert
description: Detect unavailable robots, alert operators, and escalate unresolved downtime to a site lead.

name: Appointment Scheduling
description: Book available appointments, prevent double booking, and notify users when a provider cancels.

name: Invoice Approval
description: Route invoices by amount and department, require dual approval for high-value invoices, and track rejections.

name: Customer Data Export
description: Verify a data subject request, collect data from source systems, generate an export, and expire the download.

name: Fraud Case Review
description: Create cases from risk alerts, assign an investigator, and capture disposition and supporting evidence.

name: Feature Flag Rollout
description: Create a staged rollout, stop automatically on error-rate thresholds, and support immediate rollback.

name: Enterprise User Provisioning
description: Provision users from an identity provider, map roles, and deprovision access when employment ends.

name: Right to Deletion
description: Validate deletion eligibility, respect legal holds, delete or anonymize data, and produce an audit record.
